queries.question: For every journalist, list the platforms used.
queries.sql: select multimedia_journalists.name , platforms.platform_name from Multimedia_Journalists_Platforms join Platforms on Multimedia_Journalists_Platforms.platforms_id = Platforms.id join Multimedia_Journalists on Multimedia_Journalists_Platforms.multimedia_journalist_id = Multimedia_Journalists.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?platform_name WHERE {
  ?multimedia_journalists_platforms a :Multimedia_Journalists_Platforms .
  ?platforms a :Platforms .
  ?multimedia_journalists_platforms p:hasPlatforms ?platforms .
  ?multimedia_journalists a :Multimedia_Journalists .
  ?multimedia_journalists_platforms p:hasMultimedia_Journalists ?multimedia_journalists .
  ?multimedia_journalists p:name ?name .
  ?platforms p:platform_name ?platform_name .
}

queries.question: Tell me the platforms each journalist uses.
queries.sql: SELECT Platforms.platform_name  from Multimedia_Journalists_Platforms join Platforms on Multimedia_Journalists_Platforms.platforms_id = Platforms.id join Multimedia_Journalists on Multimedia_Journalists_Platforms.multimedia_journalist_id = Multimedia_Journalists.id   GROUP BY Multimedia_Journalists_Platforms.platforms_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Multimedia_Journalists_Platforms.multimedia_journalist_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Multimedia_Journalists)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Tell me the platforms each journalist uses.
